frames.narrationSummary: Initialize the memo table as empty before recursion starts.
Start solving remainder 6.
Initialize best for remainder 6 as INF.
Try coin 1, which leaves remainder 5.
Use coin 1 and recurse on remainder 5.
Initialize best for remainder 5 as INF.
Try coin 1, which leaves remainder 4.
Use coin 1 and recurse on remainder 4.
Initialize best for remainder 4 as INF.
Try coin 1, which leaves remainder 3.
Use coin 1 and recurse on remainder 3.
Initialize best for remainder 3 as INF.
Try coin 1, which leaves remainder 2.
Use coin 1 and recurse on remainder 2.
Initialize best for remainder 2 as INF.
Try coin 1, which leaves remainder 1.
Use coin 1 and recurse on remainder 1.
Initialize best for remainder 1 as INF.
Try coin 1, which leaves remainder 0.
Use coin 1 and recurse on remainder 0.
Remainder 0 is solved: it needs 0 more coins.
Return 0 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 0 returned 0.
Check whether child result 0 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 1 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 1 to 1.
Try coin 3, which leaves remainder -2.
Use coin 3 and recurse on remainder -2.
Negative remainder -2 is impossible, so return INF.
Return INF to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder -2 returned INF.
Check whether child result INF is usable or still INF.
Try coin 4, which leaves remainder -3.
Use coin 4 and recurse on remainder -3.
Negative remainder -3 is impossible, so return INF.
Return INF to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder -3 returned INF.
Check whether child result INF is usable or still INF.
Write memo[1] = 1.
Return 1 for remainder 1.
Return 1 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 1 returned 1.
Check whether child result 1 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 2 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 2 to 2.
Try coin 3, which leaves remainder -1.
Use coin 3 and recurse on remainder -1.
Negative remainder -1 is impossible, so return INF.
Return INF to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder -1 returned INF.
Check whether child result INF is usable or still INF.
Try coin 4, which leaves remainder -2.
Use coin 4 and recurse on remainder -2.
Negative remainder -2 is impossible, so return INF.
Return INF to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder -2 returned INF.
Check whether child result INF is usable or still INF.
Write memo[2] = 2.
Return 2 for remainder 2.
Return 2 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 2 returned 2.
Check whether child result 2 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 3 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 3 to 3.
Try coin 3, which leaves remainder 0.
Use coin 3 and recurse on remainder 0.
Remainder 0 is solved: it needs 0 more coins.
Return 0 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 0 returned 0.
Check whether child result 0 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 1 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 3 to 1.
Try coin 4, which leaves remainder -1.
Use coin 4 and recurse on remainder -1.
Negative remainder -1 is impossible, so return INF.
Return INF to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder -1 returned INF.
Check whether child result INF is usable or still INF.
Write memo[3] = 1.
Return 1 for remainder 3.
Return 1 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 3 returned 1.
Check whether child result 1 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 2 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 4 to 2.
Try coin 3, which leaves remainder 1.
Use coin 3 and recurse on remainder 1.
Remainder 1 was solved earlier, so reuse memo value 1.
Return 1 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 1 returned 1.
Check whether child result 1 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 2 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 4 to 2.
Try coin 4, which leaves remainder 0.
Use coin 4 and recurse on remainder 0.
Remainder 0 is solved: it needs 0 more coins.
Return 0 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 0 returned 0.
Check whether child result 0 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 1 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 4 to 1.
Write memo[4] = 1.
Return 1 for remainder 4.
Return 1 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 4 returned 1.
Check whether child result 1 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 2 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 5 to 2.
Try coin 3, which leaves remainder 2.
Use coin 3 and recurse on remainder 2.
Remainder 2 was solved earlier, so reuse memo value 2.
Return 2 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 2 returned 2.
Check whether child result 2 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 3 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 5 to 2.
Try coin 4, which leaves remainder 1.
Use coin 4 and recurse on remainder 1.
Remainder 1 was solved earlier, so reuse memo value 1.
Return 1 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 1 returned 1.
Check whether child result 1 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 2 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 5 to 2.
Write memo[5] = 2.
Return 2 for remainder 5.
Return 2 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 5 returned 2.
Check whether child result 2 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 3 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 6 to 3.
Try coin 3, which leaves remainder 3.
Use coin 3 and recurse on remainder 3.
Remainder 3 was solved earlier, so reuse memo value 1.
Return 1 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 3 returned 1.
Check whether child result 1 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 2 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 6 to 2.
Try coin 4, which leaves remainder 2.
Use coin 4 and recurse on remainder 2.
Remainder 2 was solved earlier, so reuse memo value 2.
Return 2 to the waiting parent call.
The child call for remainder 2 returned 2.
Check whether child result 2 is usable or still INF.
Convert the child result into candidate 3 by using one more coin.
Update best for remainder 6 to 2.
Write memo[6] = 2.
Return 2 for remainder 6.
Return 2 to the waiting parent call.
Store the root result as 2.
Normalize the wrapper result to 2.
